info.title: refscanner
info.description: An assembly, type and member scanner.

commands.name: assembly
commands.description: Searches for references to the assembly with the specified simple name.

arguments.name: simpleAssemblyName
arguments.description: The simple assembly name (e.g. "StreamJsonRpc") to search for in referenced assembly lists.

commands.name: multiversions
commands.description: All assemblies that reference multiple versions of *any* assembly will be printed.

commands.name: embeddedTypes
commands.description: Searches for assemblies that have embedded types.

arguments.name: embeddableAssemblies
arguments.description: The path to an embeddable assembly.

commands.name: api
commands.description: Searches for references to a given type or member.

arguments.name: docID
arguments.description: The DocID that identifies the API member to search for references to. A DocID for a given API may be obtained by compiling a C# program with GenerateDocumentationFile=true that references the API using <see cref="the-api" /> and then inspecting the compiler-generated .xml file for that reference.

commands.name: type
commands.description: Searches for references to a given type.

arguments.name: typeName
arguments.description: The simple name of the type to find references to.

commands.name: resolveReferences
commands.description: Lists paths to assemblies referenced by a given assembly.

arguments.name: assemblyPath
arguments.description: The path to the assembly to search for assembly references.
